title: Conduct dropped ovary technique procedures for spaying cattle
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct dropped ovary technique procedures for spaying cattle demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Conduct pre-DOT evaluations

pcs.text: Identify and comply with relevant State or Territory legislation, regulations, codes of practice and animal welfare requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and comply with relevant State or Territory legislation, regulations, codes of practice and animal welfare requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and comply with relevant State or Territory legislation, regulations, codes of practice and animal welfare requirements.

pcs.text: Discuss alternatives to ovariectomy with cattle manager and carefully consider them prior to undertaking DOT procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss alternatives to ovariectomy with cattle manager and carefully consider them prior to undertaking DOT procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss alternatives to ovariectomy with cattle manager and carefully consider them prior to undertaking DOT procedure.

pcs.text: Confirm pre-operative evaluation of cattle submitted for ovary dropping with cattle manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm pre-operative evaluation of cattle submitted for ovary dropping with cattle manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm pre-operative evaluation of cattle submitted for ovary dropping with cattle manager.

pcs.text: Identify and discuss risks associated with DOT procedure with cattle manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and discuss risks associated with DOT procedure with cattle manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and discuss risks associated with DOT procedure with cattle manager.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Conduct pre-DOT evaluations

elements.title: Prepare for DOT operations

pcs.text: Monitor and determine optimal weather conditions for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and determine optimal weather conditions for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and determine optimal weather conditions for operation.

pcs.text: Select time of day for operation to minimise animal stress
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select time of day for operation to minimise animal stress?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select time of day for operation to minimise animal stress.

pcs.text: Engage adequate numbers of skilled workers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Engage adequate numbers of skilled workers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Engage adequate numbers of skilled workers.

pcs.text: Select appropriate holding yards, forcing yards, race and settling yards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate holding yards, forcing yards, race and settling yards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate holding yards, forcing yards, race and settling yards.

pcs.text: Follow low-stress stock mustering, movement and handling procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow low-stress stock mustering, movement and handling procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow low-stress stock mustering, movement and handling procedures.

pcs.text: Allow cattle to settle and cool after yarding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allow cattle to settle and cool after yarding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allow cattle to settle and cool after yarding.

pcs.text: Select required DOT equipment and check for safe operation, cleanliness and hygienic condition to reduce the risk of infection and cross-infection

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check cattle crush used for procedure is maintained in good working order and operated to ensure minimal risk to the operator and animal.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sharpen ovariotome regularly and disinfect before use and between each procedure.

elements.title: Conduct DOT procedures

pcs.text: Conduct procedures according to workplace health and safety, biosecurity and animal welfare requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct procedures according to workplace health and safety, biosecurity and animal welfare requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct procedures according to workplace health and safety, biosecurity and animal welfare requirements.

pcs.text: Maintain facilities, hands, handling and equipment hygiene throughout the procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain facilities, hands, handling and equipment hygiene throughout the procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain facilities, hands, handling and equipment hygiene throughout the procedures.

pcs.text: Handle cattle quietly in the holding yards, forcing yards and race so that they are relatively calm when they reach the crush
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle cattle quietly in the holding yards, forcing yards and race so that they are relatively calm when they reach the crush?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle cattle quietly in the holding yards, forcing yards and race so that they are relatively calm when they reach the crush.

pcs.text: Identify common DOT procedural impediments and plan remedial actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify common DOT procedural impediments and plan remedial actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify common DOT procedural impediments and plan remedial actions.

pcs.text: Provide pain management according to legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide pain management according to legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide pain management according to legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Perform DOT procedures according to industry best practice standards and processing rates
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform DOT procedures according to industry best practice standards and processing rates?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform DOT procedures according to industry best practice standards and processing rates.

pcs.text: Apply identification earmarks or ear tags to cattle upon completion of procedures, according to relevant State or Territory legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply identification earmarks or ear tags to cattle upon completion of procedures, according to relevant State or Territory legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply identification earmarks or ear tags to cattle upon completion of procedures, according to relevant State or Territory legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Release and allow ovariectomised animals to settle on to feed and water in the settling yards for several hours, before moving them quietly to pasture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Release and allow ovariectomised animals to settle on to feed and water in the settling yards for several hours, before moving them quietly to pasture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Release and allow ovariectomised animals to settle on to feed and water in the settling yards for several hours, before moving them quietly to pasture.

elements.title: Carry out post DOT procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record cattle identity and date of the procedure, with details of significant observations where required.

pcs.text: Inspect cattle regularly with minimal disturbance for signs of post-operative complications during the healing process and take appropriate action where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect cattle regularly with minimal disturbance for signs of post-operative complications during the healing process and take appropriate action where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect cattle regularly with minimal disturbance for signs of post-operative complications during the healing process and take appropriate action where required.
